create-requisitions: AI captures role requirements, budget, location, duration and approval rules, then drafts complete requisitions with fewer manual fields.
route-approvals: Approval paths are triggered automatically based on department, spend level, hiring manager, location and program policy.
communicate-with-suppliers: Suppliers receive clear requisition updates, submission requests, interview notes and status changes without manual follow-up.
screen-submissions: Candidate submissions are checked against role requirements, compliance needs and program rules before they reach hiring teams.
coordinate-interviews: Interview scheduling, reminders, availability checks and feedback collection are coordinated across managers, suppliers and candidates.
manage-onboarding: Worker onboarding tasks, documents, start dates, access needs and required checkpoints are organized in one automated flow.
track-compliance: Credentials, documents, policy requirements, expirations and audit gaps are monitored continuously across the worker lifecycle.
validate-timesheets: Timesheets are reviewed against assignments, rates, schedules, approval rules and exceptions before downstream billing or payroll.
surface-insights: Program signals such as cycle time, supplier performance, spend patterns and bottlenecks are surfaced for faster decisions.
recommend-actions: The platform suggests next steps for stalled requisitions, compliance risks, pending approvals and supplier follow-ups.
